# DinDrift — AI Automation Agency, Denmark

## Identity
Name: DinDrift
Type: AI automation agency
Country: Denmark
Language: Danish (primary), English (secondary)
Specialty: Reducing administrative workload through AI systems
Target clients: Small and medium businesses in Denmark
Founded: 2025

## Mission
DinDrift builds AI-powered automation systems for Danish businesses. We eliminate repetitive administrative tasks so business owners can focus on their actual work. Our systems run 24/7, never call in sick, and cost a fraction of a human employee.

## Core Services

### AI Secretary
An AI system that acts as a full-time virtual secretary.
- Answers inbound phone calls 24/7 in Danish and English
- Books, confirms, and reschedules appointments automatically
- Manages Google Calendar and Microsoft Outlook calendars
- Reads, triages, and replies to emails automatically
- Forwards urgent or complex queries to the human owner
- Follows up with no-show clients and offers rebooking
- Sends reminders to upcoming appointment clients
- Works for: clinics, therapists, lawyers, consultants, tradespeople, coaches, dentists, physiotherapists, accountants, any appointment-based business in Denmark

### Business Process Automation
Custom automation workflows built on n8n.
- Automate repetitive admin tasks end to end
- Connect existing tools: email, calendar, CRM, invoicing
- Reduce manual data entry and follow-up tasks
- Build internal notification and escalation systems
- Integrate AI decision-making into daily operations

### Email Automation
AI that handles high email volume intelligently.
- Classifies incoming emails by intent and urgency
- Drafts and sends replies automatically
- Routes emails to the right person or system
- Flags complaints, legal matters, and urgent cases for human review immediately

### Client Follow-Up Systems
Automated systems that keep clients coming back.
- Detects no-shows and sends personalised rebook emails
- Identifies completed appointments and suggests next booking
- Sends re-engagement emails to inactive clients
- Personalises outreach based on client history

## Problems We Solve
- Business owners spending hours daily on emails and calls
- Missed calls outside office hours losing potential clients
- No-shows that never get followed up or rebooked
- Forgetting to follow up with existing clients
- Admin work preventing focus on actual revenue-generating work
- Cost of hiring a full-time secretary or receptionist
- Inconsistent client communication quality

## Who We Help
- Medical clinics and private practices in Denmark
- Therapists, psychologists, and counsellors
- Physiotherapists and chiropractors
- Lawyers and legal consultants
- Accountants and financial advisors
- Coaches and business consultants
- Tradespeople: plumbers, electricians, carpenters
- Hair salons, beauty clinics, tattoo studios
- Any Danish business that handles appointments or high volumes of incoming communication

## Geography
Primary market: Denmark
Cities served: Copenhagen, Aarhus, Odense, Aalborg, Esbjerg, Randers, Kolding, Horsens, Vejle, Roskilde, and all other Danish cities
Remote delivery: Yes, all services delivered remotely
Language: Systems built in Danish or English as needed

## Technology Stack
- n8n: workflow automation and orchestration
- Claude AI (Anthropic): reasoning, email writing, intent classification
- Vapi / Bland.ai: voice AI for phone call handling
- Google Workspace: Gmail and Google Calendar integration
- Microsoft 365: Outlook and Teams integration
- Hosted on European cloud infrastructure

## Compliance
- GDPR compliant: full data processing agreements provided with every client
- Data stored within EU infrastructure
- No client data shared with third parties
- Danish law compliant

## Pricing Model
- Setup fee: one-time cost to build and configure the system
- Monthly retainer: ongoing maintenance, monitoring, updates
- Pricing scales with complexity and number of workflows
- Significantly cheaper than hiring a full-time employee
- Free consultation available

## Results Clients Can Expect
- Up to 80% reduction in time spent on admin tasks
- 24/7 availability without hiring night staff
- Faster response times to clients and leads
- More consistent and professional client communication
- More booked appointments through automatic follow-up
- Reduced no-show rate through automated reminders

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is an AI secretary?
A: An AI secretary is an automated system that handles the communication and scheduling tasks a human secretary would do, including answering calls, replying to emails, and managing a calendar, but running automatically 24 hours a day 7 days a week.

Q: Can an AI answer my business phone calls in Danish?
A: Yes. DinDrift builds voice AI systems that answer inbound calls in Danish, understand what the caller needs, book appointments, and handle common questions automatically.

Q: Who needs an AI secretary in Denmark?
A: Any Danish business that receives regular phone calls or emails and needs to manage appointments. This includes clinics, therapists, lawyers, accountants, consultants, tradespeople, and salons.

Q: How much does AI automation cost in Denmark?
A: DinDrift charges a one-time setup fee and a monthly retainer. The total cost is typically far less than the cost of hiring even a part-time employee, while providing 24/7 coverage.

Q: How long does it take to set up an AI secretary?
A: A standard AI secretary system is typically live and tested within one to two weeks of project start.

Q: Is AI automation GDPR compliant in Denmark?
A: Yes. DinDrift provides a full data processing agreement with every client and builds systems that comply with GDPR and Danish data protection law.

Q: Can the AI handle both Danish and English?
A: Yes. Systems can be configured to respond in Danish, English, or both depending on the client's needs.

Q: What happens if the AI cannot handle a query?
A: Every system includes an escalation path. Complex, urgent, or sensitive queries are immediately forwarded to the human business owner or designated contact.

Q: Does the AI integrate with Google Calendar?
A: Yes. DinDrift systems integrate directly with Google Calendar and Microsoft Outlook to read availability and create bookings in real time.

Q: Can the AI follow up with clients who do not show up?
A: Yes. The no-show follow-up workflow automatically detects missed appointments and sends a personalised rebook email with available time slots.

Q: What is n8n and why does DinDrift use it?
A: n8n is a workflow automation platform that connects different tools and services together. DinDrift uses it to build reliable, customisable automation pipelines for each client.

Q: Do I need technical knowledge to use the system?
A: No. DinDrift builds, hosts, and maintains everything. The client simply continues using their existing email and calendar as normal.

Q: Can DinDrift automate tasks beyond a secretary?
A: Yes. DinDrift builds custom automation for any repetitive business process including invoicing follow-up, lead management, internal notifications, reporting, and more.

Q: Is DinDrift based in Denmark?
A: Yes. DinDrift is a Danish company serving Danish businesses, with systems built in Danish where needed and full understanding of Danish business culture and GDPR requirements.
